allow: Bash(powershell "Get-PnpDevice | Select FriendlyName, Status, InstanceId | Where-Object { $_FriendlyName -like ''*blan*'' -or $_FriendlyName -like ''*bluetooth*'' -or $_FriendlyName -like ''*personal area*'' }")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-PnpDevice | Select-Object FriendlyName, Status, InstanceId | Format-List")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object {$_Status -eq ''Error''} | Format-List FriendlyName, Status, Problem, InstanceId")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-PnpDevice | Format-List FriendlyName, Status, Problem, InstanceId, HardwareID")
Bash(ssh root@204.168.191.215 "id golf 2>/dev/null || adduser --disabled-password --gecos 'Short Game App' golf && echo 'User golf ready'")

Bash(ssh root@204.168.191.215 "sudo -u postgres psql -c \\"CREATE USER shortgame WITH PASSWORD 'shortgame_pwd_2026';\\" 2>&1; sudo -u postgres psql -c \\"CREATE DATABASE shortgame OWNER shortgame;\\" 2>&1")
Bash(ssh root@204.168.191.215 "sudo -u golf ssh-keygen -t ed25519 -f /home/golf/.ssh/deploy_key -N '' -C 'golf@short-game' 2>&1 && cat /home/golf/.ssh/deploy_key.pub")
